query_normalized: predicting battery degradation from public cycling data with recurrent neural networks materials science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) by providing direct evidence on the specific biological/physical mechanism of battery degradation (capacity fade due to side-reactions in silicon anodes) and criterion (b) by measuring the dependent variable (capacity fade) on the user's domain (lithium-ion batteries), serving as essential foundational material for the "materials science" aspect of the user's literature review.
